title: Cleaners
summary: A faction formed from sanitation workers and first responders who attempt to eradicate infection through fire.

claims.text: The Cleaners are former sanitation workers and first responders.
Their original leader Joe Ferro adopted fire as the faction's method for eliminating Green Poison.
By Warlords of New York, the Cleaners have regrouped with new recruits under Vivian Conley, one of Aaron Keener's lieutenants.

paragraphs.text: The Cleaners turn public-service backgrounds into an extreme containment ideology, treating fire as the answer to infection.
The faction survives the loss of its original leader and reappears in Lower Manhattan with new leadership and recruits.

verification.notes: This page covers the official Warlords of New York faction recap and not every later seasonal change.
